g.text: reconcile desired spec and live status
read CR status and finalizer state
get the current resource by known identifier
persist the resolved OCID in status
persist the created OCID in status
Confirm deletion with GetApplication until the resource is DELETED or not found.
remove the finalizer after delete confirmation
- diff-based update from observable ACTIVE and INACTIVE application
Fail explicit-ID binding when the observed application is already DELETED.
apply the supported in-place mutation path
- The formal model intentionally excludes unobservable asynchronous
- INACTIVE is treated as a ready-state outcome rather than a retryable
